summary: Iteration 121: Frontend testing for Pet Soul Journey crash bug fix. Verified ACHIEVEMENTS.find() bug fix at UnifiedPetPage.jsx line 432. All 4 tests passed - Pet Soul Journey page loads without crash, all 8 Soul Questionnaire categories display correctly.

backend_issues.note: Backend testing skipped as per request - frontend only testing

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: ACHIEVEMENTS.find() changed to ACHIEVEMENTS[achievementId] at line 432-433
ACHIEVEMENTS is correctly defined as an object (not array) in PetAchievements.jsx line 16
No remaining instances of ACHIEVEMENTS.find(), .filter(), or .map() in codebase
Pet Soul Journey page loads without JavaScript errors
All 8 Soul Questionnaire categories display with correct progress percentages
Concierge Command Center ticket click handler (openItem) is properly implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Soul Journey crash bug is fixed. The ACHIEVEMENTS.find() error no longer occurs. Page loads correctly at /pet/pet-99a708f1722a and /pet/pet-99a708f1722a?tab=personality. All 8 Soul Questionnaire categories display with progress bars. Admin portal requires login to test Concierge Command Center ticket clicks.
